backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user authentication, super admin initialization, role-based access control with admin permissions, and integrating blob storage, authorization mixins, and HTTP outcalls for a school management system.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend components and pages, describing routing, layout, navigation, and content management features for the Barobo National High School website.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component configuring TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClient provider, and Layout wrapper for the school website.
frontend/src/components/Banner.tsx: Banner component displaying school banner images from backend or default fallback, with support for animated GIFs, cache-busting, image proxying, and responsive aspect ratio.
frontend/src/components/BannerManager.ts: Admin component for managing banner images with device upload or external URL options, real-time URL validation, preview functionality, and progress tracking for uploads.
frontend/src/components/FacebookPresence: Renders a Facebook Page Plugin iframe embed for the school's Facebook page with loading states, error handling, and a fallback link with icon when the embed fails to load.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with school logo, contact information, social media links, and an animated marquee copyright notice with credits to the development team.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the main navigation header with a data-driven menu structure including dropdowns, mobile sheet menu, and authentication controls (login/logout/dashboard) using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main layout wrapper component that composes Banner, Header, main content outlet, and Footer in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Displays a page header with title, optional description, customizable background style with error handling, and optional blinking title animation.
frontend/src/components/PhilippineTimeCl: Shows a live clock displaying Philippine Standard Time (GMT+8) formatted as a sentence with day, date, and time, updating every second.
frontend/src/components/SchoolActivities: Fetches and displays school activity images in an auto-playing carousel with infinite loop, sorted by display order, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/WeatherForecastS: Displays current weather and 3-day forecast for Barobo, Caraga using the useBaroboWeather hook, with weather icons mapped to condition codes and loading/error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBaroboWeather.ts: React Query hook that fetches current weather and 3-day forecast for Barobo, Caraga from Open-Meteo API, mapping WMO weather codes to human-readable descriptions with 30-minute caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend canister interactions including user profiles, admin permissions, content management (banners, heritage, alumni), analytics, and file operations with mutation invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for school branding (maroon/gold), Citizen Charter themes, dark mode support, and styling overrides for Quill editor and navigation dropdowns.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlobUpload.ts: Utility for uploading files via ExternalBlob with progress tracking, resilient URL validation using HEAD/GET requests with exponential backoff retries (up to 8 attempts) to handle eventual consistency.
frontend/src/lib/facebookPagePlugin.ts: Helper function to generate Facebook Page Plugin iframe URLs with configurable options for tabs, dimensions, header style, and social features.
frontend/src/lib/imageProxy.ts: Provides utilities to proxy cloud storage URLs (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Photos) through the backend to bypass CORS restrictions, including validation functions for images and videos with detailed error messages.
frontend/src/lib/uploadErrorMessage.ts: Parses and categorizes upload errors (permission, network, validation, backend, size, generic) into user-friendly messages with detailed error classification and logging utilities.
frontend/src/lib/urlConverter.ts: Converts cloud storage sharing URLs (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Photos) and YouTube links to direct media access or embeddable formats with client-side detection and fallback handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/ActionResearchPage.ts: Presents information about teacher-led action research initiatives, including research areas (instructional strategies, engagement, assessment) and the research process steps.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that handles Super Admin initialization and recovery, displays user role/permissions, and provides navigation to various admin management sections with authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/AdvisoriesCircularsPa: Simple page displaying a placeholder for school advisories and circulars with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
Admin page for managing alumni content (title, description, community engagement) and alumni profiles (name, graduation year, achievements, position) with create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/pages/AlumniPage.tsx: Public-facing alumni page displaying alumni content and distinguished graduate profiles with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsDashboardPag: Super Admin-only analytics dashboard showing visitor and login statistics with bar/line charts for daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly metrics.
frontend/src/pages/ARALProgramPage.tsx: Displays information about the ARAL (Accelerated Reading for All Learners) program focused on improving reading comprehension and literacy skills.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivedIssuancesPage: Placeholder page for displaying historical records of past issuances and documents.
Admin page wrapper for the BannerManager component to upload and manage the school website banner.
frontend/src/pages/BKDPage.tsx: Static informational page about the Bawat Bata Bumabasa (BKD) literacy program.
frontend/src/pages/BNHSHymnManagementPag: Admin page for uploading and managing the school hymn video via file upload or URL (YouTube/external links) with preview and validation.
frontend/src/pages/BrigadaEskwelaPage.ts: Static informational page about the Brigada Eskwela school maintenance and improvement program.
frontend/src/pages/BYESOPage.tsx: Static informational page about the Barangay Youth and Education Support Office (BYESO).
frontend/src/pages/ChildProtectionPolicy: Static informational page displaying the school's child protection policy and procedures.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterManagem: Admin page for managing Citizen's Charter content including background images, static images, and editable sections for contact info, office hours, and school hours with file/URL upload support.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterPage.ts: Public-facing Citizen's Charter page displaying school contact information, office hours, school hours, background image, static image, and embedded Google Maps location.
frontend/src/pages/ClassroomObservationP: Simple page describing classroom observation practices for monitoring teaching effectiveness and supporting professional growth.
frontend/src/pages/ClubsOrganizationsPag: Displays student clubs (Science, Math, English, Arts, Sports, Music) and special organizations (PAT, JDRRA, BYESO) with descriptions and icons.
frontend/src/pages/DepEdMemorandaPage.ts: Placeholder page for displaying official Department of Education memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DepEdOrdersPage.tsx: Placeholder page for displaying official Department of Education orders with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DivisionMonitoringPag: Simple page describing division-level monitoring and evaluation coordination with the division office.
frontend/src/pages/DivisionOrdersMemoran: Placeholder page for displaying Division Office orders and memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadableFormsPage: Displays a grid of downloadable school forms (enrollment, Brigada Eskwela, 4P's, SF2, SF3, etc.) with download buttons and an early registration portal link.
frontend/src/pages/ESWMPage.tsx: Describes the Ecological Solid Waste Management program promoting waste segregation, recycling, composting, and environmental sustainability.
frontend/src/pages/FARPage.tsx: Simple page describing Field Assistance Reports for documenting field visits and support provided to teachers and departments.
frontend/src/pages/FinancialBoardPage.ts: Simple page describing financial transparency and accountability through reporting of school finances, budget allocation, and expenditures.
frontend/src/pages/GPPPage.tsx: Describes the Gulayan sa Paaralan Program (school gardening initiative) promoting food security, nutrition awareness, and environmental stewardship.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryManagementPage: Admin page for managing school history content with a rich text editor (ReactQuill), title input, and background image upload/URL validation supporting cloud providers (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox). Includes image preview, upload progress tracking, and mutations for updating content and background images.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Public-facing page displaying school history content with a background image overlay, title, and formatted text rendered from ReactQuill HTML. Shows loading skeletons and error alerts when content is unavailable.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring Philippine time clock, weather forecast, Facebook presence, school activities slider, BNHS hymn video (YouTube or direct), visitor counter, DepEd vision/mission, and Citizen's Charter with background/static images. Includes autoplay handling and memoized URLs.
frontend/src/pages/InfrastructurePage.ts: Static page describing school infrastructure and facilities development with a simple card layout and brief description.
frontend/src/pages/InkspirerPage.tsx: Empty page component with no content implemented.
frontend/src/pages/INSETPage.tsx: Static page describing In-Service Training (INSET) for teachers, displaying a card with title and brief description about professional development opportunities.
frontend/src/pages/InstructionalSupervis: Static page describing instructional supervision practices including classroom observations, feedback sessions, and teacher professional development support.
frontend/src/pages/JDRRAPage.tsx: Static page describing the Junior Disaster Risk Reduction and Management program, covering earthquake drills, fire safety, first aid, and emergency evacuation procedures.
frontend/src/pages/KhanAcademyPage.tsx: Static page promoting Khan Academy with a description and external link button to the Khan Academy website for free online learning resources.
frontend/src/pages/LearningCurriculumPag: Page displaying school curriculum programs using an accordion component, covering SPA (Special Program in the Arts), SPTVE (Technical/Vocational), STEM, and Senior High School tracks (Academic, TVL, Sports, Arts & Design).
frontend/src/pages/LearningMaterialsPage: Static page displaying a grid of educational resource cards with external links to SDS Division Portal, DepEd LRMDS, DepEd Website, and DepEd TV.
frontend/src/pages/LessonPlanPage.tsx: Displays a static page with a card showing guidelines and templates for lesson plans and daily lesson logs.
frontend/src/pages/MDLFeedbackPage.tsx: Displays a static page describing feedback mechanisms and means of verification for Modular Distance Learning.
frontend/src/pages/NATResourcesPage.tsx: Displays a static page with National Achievement Test preparation materials including practice tests and study guides.
frontend/src/pages/NCAEResourcesPage.tsx: Displays a static page with National Career Assessment Examination resources for career interests and aptitudes.
Displays a static page describing classroom observation tools and instruments for monitoring instruction and providing teacher feedback.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizationalStructu: Admin page for managing organizational structure images (title background and static image) with upload from device or URL, validation, preview, and removal functionality.
Public page displaying the organizational structure with a custom title background and a static organizational chart image.
frontend/src/pages/PATPage.tsx: Displays a static page describing the Parents and Teachers Association, its role, activities, and fundraising programs.
frontend/src/pages/PhysicalEvaluationPag: Displays a static page about regular evaluation of school facilities and infrastructure for safe learning environments.
frontend/src/pages/PMCFPage.tsx: Displays a static page about the Performance Management and Competency Framework for teacher evaluation and professional development.
frontend/src/pages/PRAISEPage.tsx: Displays a static page describing the PRAISE program that recognizes outstanding performance and service excellence among faculty and staff.
frontend/src/pages/PrefectOfDisciplinePa: Displays a static page describing the Prefect of Discipline office's role in maintaining order and promoting positive behavior through restorative practices.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchInnovationsPa: Displays a placeholder page for research and innovations content that will be available soon.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchOutputsPage.t: Displays a static page showcasing research publications, outputs, types of research, and impact recognition from the school community.
frontend/src/pages/SBMPage.tsx: Displays a static page about School-Based Management, emphasizing community participation in decision-making and collaborative governance.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolActivitiesManag: Admin page for managing slider images with upload from device or URL, validation, preview, edit/delete functionality, and authentication checks. Uses custom hooks for backend queries and image proxy validation.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolBasedResearchPa: Displays information about school-based research initiatives, including focus areas (curriculum, student performance, engagement) and collaborative research approaches.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolHealthPage.tsx: Simple page describing school health and nutrition programs including health screenings, feeding programs, and health education.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolOrdersMemoranda: Placeholder page for school orders and memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/SIPPage.tsx: Displays a static page describing the School Improvement Plan with strategic initiatives for enhancing educational quality and outcomes.
frontend/src/pages/SMEAPage.tsx: Displays a static page about School Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses Allocation reporting.
frontend/src/pages/SOSAPage.tsx: Displays a static page about School Operations and School Administration covering comprehensive management and operational aspects.
frontend/src/pages/SPTAPage.tsx: Displays a simple page with header and card describing the School Parent-Teacher Association, its activities, and financial transparency.
frontend/src/pages/StorageMonitorPage.ts: Super Admin-only page displaying storage statistics, usage percentage, file type breakdown with pie chart, and capacity warnings using Recharts visualization.
frontend/src/pages/StudentCornerPage.tsx: Displays two cards on a maroon background showcasing student outputs/projects and a freedom wall for student expression.
frontend/src/pages/SummativeAssessmentPa: Simple page describing summative assessment monitoring for evaluating student learning outcomes.
frontend/src/pages/SupportServicesPage.t: Displays comprehensive support services grid including guidance, library, health, career guidance, and learning support with icons and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/TheInkspirerPage.tsx: Displays announcements/news with a header image, fetches data via useGetAnnouncements hook, and renders cards with important badges and formatted publish dates.
frontend/src/pages/TintangBaloboPage.tsx: Placeholder page for school publication content with a header and a card showing 'Content will be available soon' message.
frontend/src/pages/TOsPage.tsx: Simple page describing Teaching Observations for assessing instructional effectiveness and providing developmental feedback.
frontend/src/pages/TQPage.tsx: Simple page describing Teacher Quality standards and benchmarks for maintaining professional competence.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: Super Admin-only page for managing admin users with CRUD operations, permission assignment, and status toggling using role-based access control and multiple mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/WINSPage.tsx: Static informational page describing the War on Illiteracy through Numeracy and Literacy Skills program with a header and content card.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (school-maroon, school-gold, school-blue, charter colors), container settings, and extended theme properties using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project state tracking critical deployment issues after Version 200 broke multiple features, documenting Super Admin principal ID recovery needs and architectural limitations preventing surgical code edits.
